hero.subtitle: Upload a photo or describe your idea. AI transforms it into stunning art — then we print it on T-shirts, hoodies, mugs & phone cases. Zero design skills. Shipped worldwide.

howItWorks.subtitle: From idea to your doorstep in days. No design skills. No complicated tools.
howItWorks.step_1_desc: Type anything: "a cyberpunk cat on Mars" or "watercolor mountain landscape." The more creative, the better.
howItWorks.step_2_desc: Our AI instantly creates 4 unique designs. Pick your favorite, tweak the style, or regenerate for fresh ideas.
howItWorks.step_3_desc: Choose your product and size. We print with premium quality and ship directly to your door — anywhere worldwide.

styleGallery.subtitle: From classic oil paintings to cyberpunk — our AI transforms your photo into the style you choose.

aiDemo.subtitle: Describe what you want, pick a style, and watch AI generate your design.
aiDemo.prompt_placeholder: e.g. "A majestic owl in a starry night..."
aiDemo.error_no_prompt: Please describe what you want to create.

products.subtitle: 5 premium products. Printed with care. Shipped worldwide from local warehouses.

whyArtShift.subtitle: Traditional custom printing requires design skills or expensive tools. ArtShift puts creative power in everyone's hands — with the most advanced AI image generation.
whyArtShift.feature_1_desc: The world's most advanced AI models, fine-tuned for design generation
whyArtShift.feature_2_desc: Photorealistic, anime, oil painting, cyberpunk, minimalism, and more
whyArtShift.feature_3_desc: Print on demand. No inventory, no waste, no commitment
whyArtShift.feature_4_desc: Printful's local warehouses in US, UK, EU & Australia for fastest delivery
whyArtShift.feature_5_desc: DTG (Direct-to-Garment) printing for vibrant, durable designs
whyArtShift.feature_6_desc: Stripe-powered. All major cards, PayPal, Apple Pay & Google Pay accepted

testimonials.review_1_text: I had zero design skills. Printed a custom hoodie with my cat in Van Gogh style. It looks incredible.
testimonials.review_2_text: Ordered from Germany, arrived in 5 days. The print quality is better than any store-bought shirt.
testimonials.review_3_text: Made personalized mugs for my entire team. They loved it. Will order again for sure.

waitlist.footer: No spam. Unsubscribe anytime. We respect your inbox.

faq.q_1: How does the AI design generation work?
faq.a_1: Simply describe what you want in plain English. Our AI — powered by ChatGPT Image Generation and Stable Diffusion XL — generates 4 unique designs based on your description. You can regenerate, adjust styles, or pick your favorite.
faq.a_2: We ship to 30+ countries worldwide via Printful's global production network. This includes the United States, Canada, all EU countries, UK, Australia, Japan, and more. US/EU typically 3-7 business days, other regions 7-14 business days.
faq.q_3: How long does production and shipping take?
faq.a_3: Production typically takes 2-5 business days. Shipping adds 2-7 business days depending on location. You'll receive a tracking number via email as soon as your order ships.
faq.q_4: What payment methods do you accept?
faq.a_4: We accept all major credit cards (Visa, Mastercard, Amex), PayPal, Apple Pay, Google Pay, and Shop Pay. All transactions are processed securely via Stripe.
faq.q_5: Can I upload my own photo?
faq.a_5: Yes! You can upload JPG, PNG, or WebP files up to 20MB. Our AI will transform your photo into various artistic styles — cartoon, anime, oil painting, sketch — and then apply it to any product.
faq.a_6: Since all products are custom-printed specifically for you, we cannot accept returns for changed minds. However, if your item arrives damaged or defective, we'll replace it at no cost. Contact us within 7 days of delivery with photos.

footer.description: AI-powered custom products. Turn your imagination into wearable art.
